apps.name: Obsidian
apps.summary: Knowledge base and note-taking app working on a local folder of plain-text Markdown files, with linking, graph view, and plugins.

apps.name: Logseq
apps.summary: Local-first, open-source outliner notebook for organizing your personal knowledge base over plain-text Markdown and Org-mode files.

apps.name: Standard Notes
apps.summary: End-to-end encrypted, open-source note-taking app focused on privacy and long-term data longevity.

apps.name: Zettlr
apps.summary: Open-source Markdown editor for writers and researchers with citation, footnote, and Zettelkasten note-linking support.

apps.name: QOwnNotes
apps.summary: Open-source plain-text Markdown notepad and to-do manager with Nextcloud/ownCloud integration.

apps.name: Anytype
apps.summary: Local-first, end-to-end encrypted, open-source app for notes, documents, and personal knowledge graphs.

apps.name: Trilium Notes
apps.summary: Open-source hierarchical note-taking application for building large personal knowledge bases (TriliumNext).

apps.name: Notion
apps.summary: Freeware all-in-one workspace for notes, documents, wikis, and databases (closed-source, free personal tier).
